context: Capsule for dual-surface pairing, authority resolution, stable-surface governance, capsule routing, sync discipline, control taxonomy, provenance summaries, claim-diff posture, and deterministic human-surface generation. Routes detailed stable-surface authority, lifecycle, and stable contract rules to detail governance modules. bidirectional sync remains experimental until merge protocol exists.
assumptions: Corpus may include human-facing surfaces outside JSON module registry
module.layer drives progressive disclosure and authority posture

sections.content: Manifest is corpus root. layer=root -> boot and routing. layer=capsule -> short summary + route fanout. layer=detail -> semantic authority. layer=evidence -> proof|draft only. Human surfaces stay outside module registry; manifest.surface_pairs links them back to agent-primary modules.

detail beats capsule on semantic conflict. root beats downstream layers on routing conflict. evidence may annotate but not override. Human surfaces do not replace agent-primary semantic authority. human-primary remains an explicit exception that must be declared.

Each pair has pair_id, scope, agent_primary, human_primary, sync_source, status. agent_supporting and human_supporting are optional. shared_invariants is optional and declares exact strings that must stay present in both agent_primary and human_primary for high-risk semantic parity. human_generation is optional and currently supports only opt-in deterministic generation under agent-primary. v1 profiles are overview and checklist. Generated human_primary must re-render exactly from pair metadata plus paired agent modules; manual edits are drift. Validator may also run conservative claim-diff checks on high-signal paired claims such as from-to deltas, must-include lists, timed actions, and execution preconditions. Claim-diff extraction reads agent_primary context, sections, and structured artifact semantics, and it compares full claim sets rather than treating one overlapping value as agreement. Exact paired touch routes are also part of the contract: if both human_primary and agent_primary declare an exact route for the same intent, the human route must include the pair's semantic modules and must stay inside the paired agent route. Paths must be relative and stay inside corpus root. Human surfaces do not replace agent-primary semantic authority. sync_source controls update direction. The reference hook rejects human-only edits under agent-primary unless the touched human surface is a valid deterministic regeneration, rejects agent-only edits under human-primary, and requires manual review when bidirectional pairs change. Manifest metadata alone does not satisfy agent-primary semantic synchronization. bidirectional sync is experimental until merge/conflict protocol is defined.

category=capsule <-> layer=capsule. meta.capsule required when capsule identity is used. read_when explains trigger. core_question explains decision focus. routes_to lists next modules or sections. frozen_decisions records compact invariants. Capsule stays short; detail modules hold durable semantics.

sections.topic: control role method and timing taxonomy
sections.content: Modules may declare control metadata in manifest.modules[].control and module.meta.control. role=guide -> orient, route, or explain. role=sensor -> verify, detect, block, or audit. role=hybrid -> both. method=computational -> deterministic rule, schema, exact match, or fixed algorithm. method=inferential -> heuristic or model-mediated judgment. method=hybrid -> both. timing declares when control acts: pre-commit, ci, continuous, or runtime. When declared, manifest and module copies should match so routing and deeper semantics describe the same control.

manifest.modules[].provenance is bootstrap summary: memory_role + confidence only. module.meta.provenance carries full trace: sources + confidence + review_chain. memory_role=authority -> canonical semantic source. working -> transient routing or scratch guidance. evidence -> proof-bearing material that supports but does not replace authority. sources names claim anchors. review_chain names human or automated review or handoff anchors. Keep manifest light; keep source and review detail in module meta.

artifacts.usage: Lookup table for layer semantics and authority role.
Evaluate conflict resolution between layers and human-agent pairs.

rules.action: allow human-led sync but keep pair explicit

rows: opt-in deterministic generation contract for human_primary; mode=deterministic, profile=overview|checklist, title optional
declared update direction; bidirectional remains experimental
exact semantic anchors required in both agent_primary and human_primary

artifacts.usage: Canonical update order for paired agent and human surfaces.

steps.action: update agent-primary module first; manifest metadata alone does not satisfy agent-primary sync
update paired human surface after agent semantic source is current
check pair paths, refs, and authority invariants

artifacts.usage: Required meta.capsule fields for category=capsule modules.
Field guide for control role, method, and timing metadata.

rows: whether the module primarily directs work, checks work, or does both
root and capsule modules should not be sensor-only
whether the control relies on deterministic logic, heuristic judgment, or both
computational stays preferred for blocking gates
when the control is expected to act

artifacts.usage: Field guide for provenance summary and full-trace metadata.

rows: trust posture of the module's claims
claim anchors or upstream source IDs
keep heavy trace detail out of manifest

changelog.delta: Initial AODS v3 surface governance module.
Marked bidirectional sync experimental and made capsule layer/category identity explicit.
Required paired human paths to stay inside corpus root and clarified that manifest-only edits do not satisfy agent-primary sync.
Added optional shared_invariants so paired surfaces can declare exact cross-surface semantic anchors for validator enforcement.
Documented conservative paired-surface claim-diff checks for high-signal semantic conflicts beyond exact shared_invariants.
Added explicit control taxonomy for guide/sensor role, computational/inferential method, and control timing metadata.
Added explicit provenance summary vs full-trace contract so manifest bootstrap can stay light while module meta carries source and review anchors.
Added stable-surface authority and lifecycle/exposure rules for over-implementation governance.
Routed capsule readers toward stable-surface contract details for redaction and completeness posture.

read_when: Need to choose surface layer for loading
Need to resolve agent-human documentation pairing
Need authority rule before reading human surface
capsule.core_question: How should agent-primary and human-facing surfaces stay paired, layered, and authority-safe?
frozen_decisions: detail beats capsule on semantic conflict
evidence never becomes sole semantic source
stable surfaces require explicit AODS authority
stable surfaces need explicit contract and redaction posture before broad consumption
bidirectional sync is experimental until merge protocol exists
